name: Ahmed Barakat
subject: Arabic Teacher
message: لقد ,ملكتم جزءا من القلب بجمال روحكم وذوقكم فخور بكم وأتمنى لكم الافضل دائما

name: Khulood Youssri
subject: English Teacher
message:
To my incredible graduates,

Watching you reach this milestone fills my heart with so much pride. The journey wasn't always easy — there were long nights, hard lessons, and moments of doubt — but you showed up, you pushed through, and here you are.

What you've accomplished goes far beyond a diploma. You've grown in ways you may not even fully see yet. The curiosity you've developed, the resilience you've built, and the person you've become — that is the real achievement.

As you step into this next chapter, know that you carry with you everything you need. Trust yourself. Be kind to yourself along the way. And never stop learning.

It has been one of the greatest honors of my life to be part of your story. I will be cheering for you — always.

My lovely students, congratulations to you all. I will really miss you sooooo much.

I will miss you all.
Really, you were and will always be a part of my life. I will never forget you, and I hope you will never forget your Miss. Love you all.

❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️💖💖
💋💋💋💋💋💋💋💋

With so much pride and love,

Your English Teacher,
Khokha.

name: Nermeen Darwish
subject: English Teacher
message:
To My Amazing Students,

It has been a pleasure teaching you and watching you grow.

May your future be filled with success, happiness, and endless opportunities.

The future belongs to those who believe in their dreams.

Keep learning, keep growing, and keep shining.

So proud of you all.
Love you all 😘💕
